side_effects.description: Swollen fingers, higher blood pressure, water retention at 4iu and above in 40+ age range

protocol_notes: Describes HGH as a 'pretty dirty drug' above 1-2iu with undesirable side effects. Endorses low-dose HGH supplementation (1-2iu) only for athletes with dialed diet, recovery, training, and sleep. Notes that higher doses are 'not worth it' based on personal experience.
